span.p:
Are units distinct, custom, or
made-to-order with directly
traceable costs?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
JOB-ORDER / project costing
(cost per job or batch)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is there a common process AND
a later customizing step?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPERATION / HYBRID costing
(process-cost the common steps,
job-cost the variants)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PROCESS costing
(cost per department, equivalent units)
